nasb.text: Great wealth is in the house of the righteous, But trouble is in the income of the wicked.

esv.text: In the house of the righteous there is much treasure, but trouble befalls the income of the wicked.

cnv.text: 義人家中財寶豐富； 惡人的收入卻帶來擾害。

ccb.text: 义人家中财富充足， 恶人得利惹来祸患。

csbs.text: 义人的家，有许多财富； 恶人的收获，带来扰乱。
